subcodes.first_line: After attaining unto the recognition of the Manifestation of God and the Dawning-Place of His Divine Revelation, Who is the Sovereign of beliefs, all must [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از عرفان مظهر ظهور الهی و مشرق وحی صمدانی که سلطان عقاید است باید کل
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
